name: libqcanvas-clients

metadata.name: libqcanvas-clients
metadata.summary: Provides some utilities to interact with canvas and panopto

documentation:
# QCanvas API Clients

This module provides some utilities to interact with canvas and panopto. It is only concerned with API operations
and does not provide anything for storing the data.

## Using API result caching for faster development

Set `ENABLE_API_CACHE=True` (or `1`) as an environment variable. This will store the result of each API call on disk for
re-use next time.
The cache is written to `/tmp/qcanvas_cache`.

Only use this when debugging.

methods.name: libqcanvas_clients.panopto.panopto_client.PanoptoClient.verify_config
documentation:
---
param client: The client to test with (used for doing the authentication)
param config: The config to test
raise ConfigInvalidError: If the config is invalid
raise Exception: If anything else went wrong
return: true
---

methods.name: libqcanvas_clients.canvas.canvas_client.CanvasClient.get_file_download_stream
documentation:
Gets a download stream for a file from canvas. The response is a stream and must be closed with `close()` or `aclose()`
\:param url: The url of the file
\:returns: The response as a stream

methods.name: libqcanvas_clients.canvas.canvas_client.CanvasClient.make_generic_request
documentation: This function is only here because of panopto's horrid LTI crap. Avoid using it for anything else.

methods.name: libqcanvas_clients.canvas.canvas_client.CanvasClient.verify_config
documentation:
---
param config: The config to verify
raise ConfigInvalidError: If the url or api key is invalid
---

classes.name: libqcanvas_clients.util.external_client_httpx_transport.ExternalClientHTTPXTransport

methods.name: libqcanvas_clients.util.external_client_httpx_transport.ExternalClientHTTPXTransport.close
documentation: Do not close the client. We want to keep it.

{ref}`Async Transport <async_transports>` used to execute GraphQL queries
on remote servers.

The transport uses the httpx library with anyio.

methods.name: libqcanvas_clients.util.authenticator.Authenticator.send_and_authenticate
documentation:
Sends a request, or authenticates if the response requires it, then resends the request.
\:param request:
\:param stream:
\:param follow_redirects:
\:return:
